items.q: Name the currency used in South Africa.
items.explanation: The national currency of South Africa is the rand.

items.q: Name the currency used in Thailand.
items.explanation: The national currency of Thailand is the baht.

items.q: What is the capital city of Queensland?
items.explanation: This is a core Australian general-knowledge fact.

items.q: Name the currency used in Poland.
items.explanation: The national currency of Poland is the zloty.

items.q: Name the currency used in Brazil.
items.explanation: The national currency of Brazil is the real.

items.q: Nairobi is the capital of Kenya.
items.explanation: This reflects medium-difficulty geography and civics knowledge.

items.q: Name the currency used in India.
items.explanation: The national currency of India is the rupee.

items.q: Name the currency used in Sweden.
items.explanation: The national currency of Sweden is the krona.

items.q: What is the official currency of Vietnam?
